allow: Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(styles\): 디자인 토큰 및 전역 스타일 설정 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs: 커밋 타입 style 추가 및 scope 제거 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'style: 루트 레이아웃 container 적용 및 개발 확인용 임시 border 추가 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'style: 개발 확인용 임시 border 색상 회색으로 변경 *)
Bash(git -C "c:\\team-project\\talky-owl" add CLAUDE.md docs/PROJECT_DECISIONS.md docs/db/STATUS_TRANSITION.md docs/domains/DISPUTE.md docs/domains/ROOM.md)
Bash(git -C 'c:\\team-project\\talky-owl' commit -m 'docs: 단독/1:1 판결 공통 진입 흐름 반영 및 관련 문서 일괄 수정 *)
Bash(git -C 'c:\\team-project\\talky-owl' commit -m 'merge: origin/dev 반영 및 settings.json 충돌 해결 *)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "c:\\team-project\\talky-owl\\.env"\) { Select-String -Path "c:\\team-project\\talky-owl\\.env" -Pattern "DATABASE_URL" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\($_.Line.Length, 30\)\) + "..." } } else { "No .env file found"; if \(Test-Path "c:\\team-project\\talky-owl\\.env.local"\) { ".env.local exists" } })

PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL = \(Select-String -Path ".env.local" -Pattern "^DATABASE_URL=" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line -replace '^DATABASE_URL="?|"?$','' }\); $env:DIRECT_URL = \(Select-String -Path ".env.local" -Pattern "^DIRECT_URL=" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line -replace '^DIRECT_URL="?|"?$','' }\); npx prisma migrate status --schema prisma/schema.prisma 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL = \(Select-String -Path ".env.local" -Pattern "^DATABASE_URL=" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line -replace '^DATABASE_URL="?|"?$','' }\); $env:DIRECT_URL = \(Select-String -Path ".env.local" -Pattern "^DIRECT_URL=" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line -replace '^DIRECT_URL="?|"?$','' }\); npx prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL = \(Select-String -Path ".env.local" -Pattern "^DATABASE_URL=" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line -replace '^DATABASE_URL="?|"?$','' }\); $env:DIRECT_URL = \(Select-String -Path ".env.local" -Pattern "^DIRECT_URL=" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line -replace '^DIRECT_URL="?|"?$','' }\); node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\('@prisma/client'\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.`$queryRaw`\(require\('@prisma/client'\).Prisma.sql``SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_type='BASE TABLE' ORDER BY table_name``\).then\(r => { console.log\(r.map\(t => t.table_name\).join\('\\n'\)\); p.`$disconnect`\(\) }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); p.`$disconnect`\(\) }\)")

PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL = \(Select-String -Path ".env.local" -Pattern "^DATABASE_URL=" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line -replace '^DATABASE_URL="?|"?$','' }\); $env:DIRECT_URL = \(Select-String -Path ".env.local" -Pattern "^DIRECT_URL=" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line -replace '^DIRECT_URL="?|"?$','' }\); node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\('@prisma/client'\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p[`"`$queryRaw`"`]\(require\('@prisma/client'\).Prisma.sql``SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_type='BASE TABLE' AND table_name IN \('accounts','sessions','verification_tokens'\) ORDER BY table_name``\).then\(r => { console.log\(r.length ? r.map\(t => t.table_name\).join\('\\n'\) : 'NOT FOUND'\); p[`"`$disconnect`"`]\(\) }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); p[`"`$disconnect`"`]\(\) }\)")
